headline: Trump's Quiet Bank Investments: Ethics Filings Reveal Millions Amid Regulatory Rollbacks
relevance: Trump made 170+ purchases of bank preferred securities between May and November 2025, disclosed late. Total estimated at over $20M in financial sector instruments.

headline: Trump's 2025 Financial Disclosure Reveals Massive Portfolio
relevance: CREW analysis of Trump's annual financial disclosure documenting his holdings and income sources.

headline: Schiff Demands Answers on Failure to Disclose White House Officials' Financial Disclosures
relevance: Sen. Schiff raised concerns about delayed and missing financial disclosures from Trump administration officials.

headline: Bisignano Ducks $300 Million Fiserv Loss With Move to Trump Role
relevance: Bisignano divested $530M in Fiserv stock upon taking office. Had he held, the shares would have lost $300M in value when Fiserv stock dropped 40%.

headline: Larson, Himes Refer SSA Commissioner Bisignano for SEC Investigation into Fiserv Stock Divestitures
relevance: Congressional Democrats referred Bisignano for SEC investigation, questioning whether he knew about Fiserv's impending stock decline before divesting.

headline: Warren, Wyden Probe SSA Chief Bisignano Over Fiserv Stock and Federal Contract Concerns
relevance: Senate investigation into Bisignano's $530M divestiture timing and a Fiserv federal contract awarded under murky circumstances.

headline: FAA Administrator Bedford in Violation of Ethics Agreement, Holds Millions in Republic Airways Stock
relevance: Bedford failed to divest $6-30M in Republic Airways stock within the required 90 days. OGE denied his request for an extension.

headline: FAA Chief Dumps Millions in Airline Stock Months After Ethics Deadline
relevance: Bedford finally divested $5-26M in Republic Airways stock in February 2026, months after his October 2025 ethics deadline.

headline: Lutnick's Children Bought Cantor Fitzgerald with a Loan from Tether
relevance: Lutnick transferred his Cantor stake to his children, funded by a loan from Tether — the crypto company whose $133B in reserves Cantor manages.

headline: Raskin Opens Investigation into Lutnick and Tariff Dealings
relevance: Congressional investigation into Lutnick's role in tariff decisions while holding financial interests in affected companies.

headline: Treasury Secretary Bessent Missed His Ethics Divestiture Deadline
relevance: OGE formally warned the Senate that Bessent failed to meet his 90-day divestiture deadline. The sticking point: $25M in North Dakota farmland.

headline: Treasury Secretary Bessent Finally Divests Soybean Farm — 10 Months Late
relevance: Bessent divested his North Dakota farmland in December 2025, ten months after his confirmation — well past the agreed deadline.

headline: Hegseth's Broker Contacted BlackRock About Defense ETF Before Iran Strikes
relevance: Hegseth's Morgan Stanley broker contacted BlackRock about a defense-sector ETF weeks before Trump began strikes on Iran. Pentagon denied wrongdoing.

headline: Top DOJ Official Shut Down Crypto Enforcement While Holding Crypto Investments
relevance: Deputy AG Blanche held Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana while shutting down DOJ crypto enforcement. Experts say this violated federal conflicts law.

headline: Bondi Blessed Qatar's $400M Luxury Jet Gift to Trump After Having Lobbied for Qatar
relevance: Bondi signed a DOJ memo approving Qatar's jet gift to Trump after having previously lobbied on behalf of Qatar through Ballard Partners.

headline: Energy Secretary Wright Made New Investments While in Office
relevance: Wright made up to $5.25M in new luxury real estate investments while serving as Energy Secretary.

headline: RFK Jr. and Allies Earned Millions from Wellness Industry They Now Promote from HHS
relevance: Kennedy and four advisers earned at least $3.2M from wellness-related work. His allies include founders of Levels ($300M valuation) and Truemed ($99M raised).

headline: McMahon's Disclosure Shows Bonds from Dozens of School Districts She Now Oversees
relevance: The Education Secretary holds bonds from school districts and colleges — creating a direct financial tie to institutions she oversees.

headline: Half a Dozen Members of Trump's Cabinet Hold Bitcoin Assets, Disclosures Reveal
relevance: Gabbard disclosed up to $95K in crypto (BTC ETF, Solana) plus Tesla and Rumble stock before divesting and buying Vanguard index funds.

headline: Crypto Investor Gabbard Backs Bill To Block SEC Oversight Of Crypto
relevance: Gabbard held crypto investments while supporting legislation to reduce SEC crypto oversight before her DNI confirmation.

headline: Trump Appointee Kupor Resigns from Some a16z Funds Ahead of OPM Confirmation
relevance: Kupor resigned from 32 a16z funds but kept passive stakes in 38 others. Divested Microsoft ($5-25M), Apple, Lockheed Martin, and other government contractors.

headline: Interior Secretary Burgum's Extensive Financial Ties Raise Ethics Questions
relevance: Burgum's Arthur Ventures private equity holdings and 83% late filing rate drew scrutiny. He received a 51-day filing extension from OGE.

headline: Senate Confirms Investment Banker John Phelan as Navy Secretary
relevance: Phelan, a private equity investor with an estimated $791M net worth, was confirmed 62-30. He oversees a $263.5B budget and $922B in Navy assets.

headline: Zeldin Financial Disclosures Shed Light on Consulting Work for Pro-Trump Groups
relevance: Zeldin earned $775K from consulting firm Zeldin Strategies and was paid fees by a Qatari royal family investor before becoming EPA administrator.

headline: Zeldin Reveals Qatar Ties in Financial Disclosures
relevance: Zeldin's financial disclosure revealed consulting fees from an investor connected to the Qatari royal family.

headline: Sean Duffy Confirmed as Transportation Secretary After Financial Disclosure Review
relevance: Duffy was confirmed as Transportation Secretary with a portfolio including private equity positions in KKR and Blackstone that required divestiture.

headline: Stephen Miran Appointed as Chairman of the Council of Economic Advisers
relevance: Miran divested 57 individual stock positions in a single day upon taking office, then traded S&P 500 futures and Fannie Mae stock while at CEA.

headline: Trump Has Snapped Up More Than $100 Million in Bonds Since Taking Office
relevance: Trump purchased over $100M in corporate and municipal bonds from inauguration through August 2025, including bonds from Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, and Meta.

headline: Trump Purchased Up to $51 Million in Bonds at End of 2025, Including Netflix and Warner Bros.
relevance: Trump purchased Netflix and Warner Bros. Discovery bonds days after their megadeal announcement, raising conflict-of-interest questions.

headline: Trump's SSA Head Granted Tax Break On $484M Stock Sale
relevance: Bisignano received a certificate of divestiture allowing him to defer capital gains tax indefinitely on his massive Fiserv stock sale.

headline: Trump's Social Security Chief Just Scored A Mammoth Tax Break
relevance: Analysis of how the certificate of divestiture lets Bisignano indefinitely defer capital gains taxes on his $530M Fiserv stock sale.

headline: Bedford's Violation of Ethics Agreement May Yield the Sitting FAA Chief Millions
relevance: Bedford's delay converted 16,733 private Republic shares into 652,470+ public shares via the Mesa Air merger, vastly increasing his holdings' value.

headline: More Than a Dozen U.S. Officials Sold Stocks Before Trump's Tariffs Sent the Market Plunging
relevance: Duffy sold 34 stocks two days before the tariff announcement that sent markets plunging. ProPublica investigation into pre-tariff trading.

headline: Doug Burgum's Federal Rise Highlights Weaknesses in North Dakota Ethics Rules
relevance: Burgum did not disclose oil and gas interests until seven years into his governorship. He voted ~20 times on issues related to his financial interests.
